chunks.text: And what is PIP?

chunks.title: Modules and Pip
chunks.text: Modules are used to borrow other's code

text: Welcome to 100 days of code In today's video we will talk about modules And what is PIP? Modules are used to borrow other's code You can use the code written by someone else in your Python program With modules Modules are two types Built-in modules are with us And one is with external modules Which are installed with PIP External modules are the code that people have written And they want you to use their code in your Python program Think of it as a phone And what is going on inside this phone How it is working I don't know how I can use this phone This is an external module for me I don't know what its implementation is But I can use it Built-in modules are built in other hand Which are shipped with Python programming language They don't need you to install them externally We use modules because We don't want to code everything with scratch If you are working in a big machine learning program And you are making a self-driving car with artificial intelligence Then you won't want to write a program of 10 numbers average Or you can write a program of 10 numbers geometric mean again This can be a human error This code which is written in modules It is well tested It is written by experts And because many people have used it There are very few chances of error in it If you want you can write a program with scratch for your understanding But if you use modules You will save time and effort And you will be able to work on something big Let's go to the computer screen And we will install some modules And we will see how it works Let's get started So guys I have come inside my computer screen And I will open my day 3 rappel here And you will see this video which I am recording But because this video is not recorded here So I will keep it aside You will get to see the video here by the way And along with that I will adjust it as I can You can adjust it according to your own I want to tell you quickly what modules are in python Whenever you write any code in python programming language You can write it in two ways Either you are writing that code yourself Or you can help with modules If you have installed python in your computer And you go to your terminal And you write pip So you will get to see a utility Because I am in Mac, so I will use pip3 If you are in Linux or Mac, you will use pip3 Pip works in Windows But you can see here as I have written pip3 I got to see a lot of things here If I write pip3 install pandas Now you don't need to know what pandas is What I am writing So you see here it is writing collecting pandas It is downloading a package from 1.1 MBPS Let me explain what is going on here When I write pip
